title: schizogyne glaberrima
intro: Schizogyne glaberrima, also known as the glabrous schizogyne, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schizogyne glaberrima include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Schizogyne glaberrima may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
